name: Miksha Express Transportation
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER lists Miksha Express Transportation LLC (USDOT 2557700) as an intrastate non-hazmat carrier with 1 truck/1 driver based at 8858 Rutland St, Detroit; company self-describes as family-owned trucking/logistics since 2013, not a school-bus operator.
fit_notes: Not a fit. This is a 1-truck intrastate freight/moving carrier, not a school-bus or student-transport contractor. Exclude from Summit tuck-in pipeline.

name: R Squared Transport Inc
recent_news: Operates a small fleet of wheelchair vans and mini-vans (1-2 wheelchair + 3 seated) for non-emergency medical transport in/around Springfield, IL; flat-fee within Springfield, mileage outside. Received PPP loan. No school-district contracts identified.
fit_notes: Marginal/poor fit. Pure NEMT/wheelchair-van operator, not a yellow-bus contractor. Could only be relevant if Summit is acquiring SPED/alt-transport capacity in central IL; even then, very small scale.

name: Puget Sound Cabulance
districts_or_customers: Seattle/Shoreline-area seniors and disabled clients for medical, church, family events
recent_news: Yelp lists Puget Sound Cabulance at 15527 Burke Ave N, Shoreline as CLOSED; BBB profile still active. 24/7 non-emergency wheelchair/ambulatory cabulance service. No school-district business identified.
fit_notes: Not a fit. NEMT cabulance (apparently closed at Shoreline location); not a school-bus / student-transport contractor. Exclude from Summit pipeline.

name: All State Leasing Car
recent_news: No corroborating web presence found for an operator by this exact name at 3701 Tonnelle Ave, North Bergen; name pattern ("Leasing Car") and Tonnelle Ave corridor suggest auto-leasing/livery rather than student-transport. The well-known Tonnelle Ave bus operator is First Transit (5901 Tonnelle), unrelated.
fit_notes: Likely not a fit. Name and location indicate vehicle leasing rather than a yellow-bus/SPED contractor; no school-district relationships found. Treat as out-of-scope absent contrary evidence.

name: Aunt-Med Invalid Coach
recent_news: No direct web footprint located under the spelling 'Aunt-Med Invalid Coach' (possible data-entry variant of similarly-named NJ MAV providers such as Alana Med Invalid Coach in Jersey City/Hackensack). NJ DOH lists numerous MAV/invalid-coach operators; Modivcare brokers NJ Medicaid NEMT.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Even if confirmed, this is an NJ Medicaid invalid-coach/NEMT operator, not a school-bus/SPED contractor. Exclude from Summit tuck-in pipeline.
